message:
refactor(mcp-types): replace wildcard import; add current_runtime_handle accessor

mcp_types.rs:
- Replace #[allow(clippy::wildcard_imports)] use super::* with explicit
  imports of Serialize, Deserialize, PaneFilterConfig, InjectionResult,
  PaneCapabilities, UnifiedSearchMode, and PaneInfo

runtime_compat.rs:
- Add current_runtime_handle() function that returns the currently
  installed asupersync RuntimeHandle from thread-local storage
- Add no-op stub returning None when asupersync-runtime feature is off
- Add test verifying install/clear lifecycle tracking

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
